clauses.text: Licensor hereby grants to Licensee a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-bearing license to use the Licensed Technology solely for Licensee's internal business purposes.
Licensee shall pay Licensor license fees as follows: a one-time fee of $250,000 due upon execution, and annual maintenance fees of $50,000 due on each anniversary. All fees are non-refundable.
Each party shall maintain appropriate insurance coverage customary for its industry and shall name the other party as additional insured upon request.
clauses.difficulty_note: Insurance requirements are vague and should specify minimums

clauses.text: Licensor shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Licensee from any claims alleging that the Licensed Technology infringes any third party's intellectual property rights.
clauses.difficulty_note: One-sided indemnification; Licensee should also be indemnified

clauses.text: This Agreement shall remain in effect for a period of three years from the Effective Date and shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms unless either party provides notice of non-renewal at least sixty days prior to expiration.
clauses.difficulty_note: Auto-renewal with no cap on renewals

clauses.text: Licensee acknowledges that the Licensed Technology is provided 'AS IS' without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose.
clauses.difficulty_note: Very limited warranty; consider negotiating some protections
